mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( spot_id, user_id, title, content ) VALUES ( #{spotId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS postId, p.title, ( SELECT pi.image_url FROM post_images pi WHERE pi.post_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC, pi.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl, u.id AS writerId, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.spot_id = #{spotId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND spot_id = #{spotId}

SELECT p.id AS postId, p.spot_id AS spotId, u.id AS writerId, u.nickname AS writerNickname, u.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, p.title, p.content, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, CASE WHEN pl.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT image_url AS imageUrl FROM post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
